title: grossularia binominata
intro: Grossularia binominata, also known as the creeping juniper, is a low-growing evergreen shrub native to the eastern United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include treating skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from fever and rheumatic pain. Herbal preparations of Grossularia binominata include teas, infusions, and tinctures made from its leaves, stems, and berries.
